case_title: JUAN CARLOS PORTALES VS. ELENA SANCHEZ

docket_entries.description: CONTINUANCE ORDER RETURNED UNDELIVERED. SENT TO PLAINTIFF.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $400.00 FILED BY PORTALES, JUAN CARLOS AS TO DEFENDANT SANCHEZ, ELENA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-22-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PLAINTIFF FILED SHERIFF'S DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE-SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE OF A BAD ADDRESS.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-22-2008 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO MAR-10-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PLAINTIFF TO EFFECT SERVICE ON DEFENDANT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-10-2008 - CONTINUED TO APR-30-2008 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. PLAINTIFF TO SERVE DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER SHERRY MCADAMS PRESENT ON PLAINTIFF'S BEHALF. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-30-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, NO SERVICE. NO APPEARANCE BY EITHER PARTY. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
